latHint: Think falsely accusing someone - not picture frames.
pivHint: A painting sits inside a FRAME - but to FRAME someone for a crime means to unfairly do what?
winText: Unfairly accused. FRAME was the pivot - picture FRAME to wrongly placing BLAME.
lossText: BLAME - to hold responsible, often unfairly. FRAME was the pivot: picture FRAME to framing someone.
